show.title: Decoded Stories
show.tagline: A podcast for creators and tech professionals about the real journeys behind the career.
show.description: A podcast for creators and tech professionals about the real journeys behind the career, the pivots, the setbacks, and the moments that actually shaped who they became.

episodes.title: Walking Away From a Dream Job to Build Something of Her Own
episodes.description: On leaving a dream job at GitHub, betting on herself, and what it actually feels like the morning after you quit.

episodes.title: Owning the Story You Tell About Your Work
The Discipline Behind Every “Overnight Success”
episodes.description: A conversation on research, resilience, and building a career nobody hands you a roadmap for.

episodes.title: Finding Your Lane When Everyone’s Loud Online
Rebuilding Confidence After a Rough Career Chapter
The Long Road In, No Shortcuts Included
Betting on Yourself Before Anyone Else Does
Building an Audience Without Losing Yourself
Season 3 Kickoff: What Changed This Year
Delayed Gratification in a Get-Rich-Quick World
episodes.description: The Season 2 finale on patience, long games, and why the shortcut rarely holds up.

episodes.title: The Beginning of Decoded Stories — Why I Started a Podcast

notes: Season 2 episodes 1-8 are on Spotify but weren't pulled into this file yet — grab those from Spotify for Creators before the build if you want the full archive.
Empty description fields need the real show notes pulled in, or can stay blank and just show the title.
To add real per-episode art: update the 'image' field on any episode to the correct path (e.g. 'assets/episodes/s3-ep09.jpg').
To add a direct episode link: add a 'url' field to any episode object (e.g. 'url': 'https://open.spotify.com/episode/...'). Cards fall back to the show Spotify URL if no url field is set.
